title: Danish language support
excerpt:

posts.author: Mogens (Mogens Bjerregaard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, would be nice if you could add support for Danish language to your backlog. What is the timeline for this, in case it is already planned?
Alternatively, would it be possible to build your own (danish language) portal (for creating tickets and view created tickets) using the monday.com api?
